# YapzZ

> YapzZ is the compliance-enforcement layer for regulated materials. Patent-pending hard-blocking technology validates authority, licensing, storage limits, inspections, and custody status before regulated-material transactions can commit. Approved records are sealed with correction history and audit-ready traceability.

## What YapzZ does

- **Blocks non-compliant transactions before they commit.** Patent-pending hard-blocking logic checks licensing, authorized personnel, storage limits, inspection status, audit requirements, and custody status before regulated materials can move.
- **Locks approved records with correction history.** Approved transactions are sealed into an audit-ready record. Corrections do not erase history — they create a visible amendment trail.
- **Maintains custody from shipment to acceptance.** Transfers, storage moves, field handoffs, and in-transit shipments stay connected until the receiving party accepts custody.

## Built for

Operators in: explosives, mining, energy services, commercial pyrotechnics, logistics, regulated materials.

## Platform pillars

- **Patent-Pending Hard Blocking** — compliance enforcement logic designed to stop non-compliant transactions before they commit.
- **License & Authorized Personnel Blocks** — blocks transactions when licenses are expired, users are not approved, or required authority checks are not met.
- **Magazine Capacity Blocks** — prevents movements that would exceed configured magazine limits, storage rules, or regulated-material thresholds.
- **Inspection & Audit Lockouts** — stops transactions when required inspections, audit checks, or compliance records are overdue or incomplete.

## Infrastructure layer

- **Patent-Pending Logic Core** — deterministic execution environment that evaluates regulatory logic in isolation, ensuring every operational movement is pre-validated against jurisdiction-specific mandates.
- **Unified Traceability Fabric** — interconnected graph of custody records that links material origin, handler history, and regulatory approvals into a single, navigable source of truth.
- **Secure Data Architecture** — encrypted compliance records, role-based access control, immutable audit trails, and tenant-isolated data architecture.

## How YapzZ differs from inventory systems

Inventory systems track what already happened. YapzZ uses patent-pending hard-blocking logic to decide what is allowed to happen next — before the transaction can commit. No silent edits. No missing authority checks. No retroactive audits.

## Pilot

Stand up enforcement, sealing, and chain-of-custody for one site in 30 days with zero infrastructure changes. Audit on day 31.

## Company

YapzZ LLC. Compliance enforcement infrastructure for regulated materials. Patent pending.
